props.title: Hear Chris Villa of Measured discuss all things Puck
props.description: Hear Chris Villa discuss Puck and Measured past and present, as well as balancing open source with commercial viability, on The Craft of Open Source podcast.

props.title: Hear Chris Villa of Measured discuss all things Puck
props.author: Paul Love
props.content:
Measured co-founder [Chris Villa](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chrisvilla/) is on the [latest episode](https://www.flagsmith.com/podcast/puck-measured) of [The Craft of Open Source podcast](https://www.flagsmith.com/podcast) with Ben Rometsch.

It’s a wide-ranging interview — and a great chance to hear more about [Puck](https://puckeditor.com/), our open-source visual editor for React.

Chris talks about things like:

- How and why Puck came to be
- Puck’s successful [announcement on Hacker News](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=37391848) in 2023
- Balancing open source and commercial viability
- The story of Measured, including insights into our client work
- How an agency environment has informed Puck

… and more besides.

The episode is now [available on the web](https://www.flagsmith.com/podcast/puck-measured), and through all good podcast platforms. Why not have a listen?

Thanks to Ben and [Flagsmith](https://www.flagsmith.com/) for having Chris along.

We’d love to hear your thoughts. Get involved on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/chrisvilla.bsky.social/post/3lgauqhep5k2v) or [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7287454403437969408).
